_comment_synthetic: Pure mock placeholder pools per Ghaisan Decision 2 (2026-04-22). Every identifier here is fictional. Listing slugs mirror the niche-vertical creator examples from NarasiGhaisan Section 5 so demo tooltips read as plausible agent listings without impersonating any real user or product.

amount_distribution._note: Range chosen so most pulses read as micropayment kaya-listrik charges with an occasional larger creator_payout. Values sampled uniformly in log space for demo variation.

kind_weights._note: Weights sum to 1.0. Invocations dominate so the demo reads as an active marketplace; payouts and fees appear frequently enough to convey the revenue-share narrative.
